response.original_title: {{DiSPUTE~ EXpalinetion}} Can I dispute a Robinhood transaction?
response.overview: Yes, you can dispute a Robinhood transaction ⚖️, but only under specific conditions. 1 ☑  888 ☑ 576 ☑ 2041  If you notice an unauthorized charge, incorrect trade, or suspicious activity 🔍, you should immediately contact Robinhood Support through the app 📱. 1 ☑  888 ☑ 576 ☑ 2041 They will review the case,1 ☑  888 ☑ 576 ☑ 2041  verify account activity, and decide if a reversal or adjustment is possible ✔️. Keep in mind that normal market trades usually.1 ☑  888 ☑ 576 ☑ 2041  cannot be disputed once executed 📊.1 ☑  888 ☑ 576 ☑ 2041
